readyToStartSubtitle: In a few steps you'll set up Inovy to perfectly match your workflow.
featureQuickStartDescription: Start a recording, and Inovy does the rest
featurePrivacyDescription: Your conversation data is stored encrypted and never shared with third parties
featureReadyToUseDescription: Automatic transcription and summary of your conversations
stepNameSubtitle: Let's start by getting to know each other. What should we call you?
stepAccountTypeSubtitle: Are you using Inovy as an individual or on behalf of an organization?
stepResearchQuestionSubtitle: What are you researching? This helps us support you better (optional)
stepResearchQuestionPlaceholder: E.g. I'm researching the experiences of healthcare providers with digital tools...
stepCalendarSubtitle: Automatically sync conversations with your calendar
stepOrgSizeSubtitleDefault: How many employees does your organization have?
stepOrgNameSubtitle: What is the name of your organization?
stepOrgNameWelcome: Welcome! Discover all features and make Inovy completely yours.
stepInviteSubtitle: Add email addresses of colleagues you want to invite. They will receive an invitation by email.
stepInviteHintEmpty: Press Enter to add. You can also paste multiple addresses.
stepInviteHintCount: {count, plural, one {# colleague will be invited} other {# colleagues will be invited}}
stepInviteSkipHint: You can also skip this step and invite colleagues later via settings.
stepReferralTitle: How did you hear about us?
stepReferralSubtitle: This helps us improve our marketing.
stepReferralHint: Choose a source or fill in another source.
stepReferralOtherPlaceholder: E.g. Via a friend, a blog post, a podcast...
stepNewsletterSubtitle: Stay up to date with new features and tips
stepNewsletterLabel: Yes, keep me informed about new features, tips and updates via the newsletter
stepTitleReferral: How did you hear about us?
